backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FarmSiddhi backend, implementing user profile management, contact form submission, product catalog CRUD, and order management with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (CartContext, Cart page, Checkout page, Order Confirmation page, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FarmSiddhi React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the Vite entry point at /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with eleven lazy-loaded page routes, wraps the app in CartProvider, QueryClientProvider, and ThemeProvider, and renders a shared Navigation/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the FarmSiddhi logo, contact details, social media links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook), copyright notice, and a Caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive sticky navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, logo, nav links, and a cart icon with item count badge using CartContext.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus computed cartTotal and itemCount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating contact forms, products, and orders via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, base body styles, and reusable utility component classes like section-container and watermark-container.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: Static About Us page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in cards, plus a 'Why Choose FarmSiddhi' section.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing all orders and contact form submissions, including order status update functionality with color-coded badges.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, line totals, remove buttons, and an order summary sidebar with a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a form for buyer details and shipping address that submits an order via the usePlaceOrder hook, then clears the cart and navigates to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, phone, message, user type) that submits via useSubmitContactForm, alongside static contact info cards for email, phone, and address.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Static informational page describing the company's export services (quality assurance, packaging, logistics, trade support, compliance) and international certifications.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Displays the Farmer Network page with a grid of service cards (Direct Procurement, Fair Pricing, Aggregation, Quality Standardization, Supply Chain Digitization) and a benefits section highlighting market access and other farmer advantages.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the Home page with a hero section, company introduction, a services overview grid (Aggregation, Quality Control, Processing, Packaging, Logistics), and a product showcase linking to individual product category pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows an order confirmation page that fetches order details by ID, displays buyer info, shipping address, order items, and status badge with color coding, with loading and error states handled.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a product detail page for a given category, fetching products via a query hook, allowing variant selection and quantity adjustment, and supporting add-to-cart functionality with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Renders a products listing page with a grid of cards for six agricultural product categories (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Foods, Makhana), each linking to its respective detail page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining custom colors using OKLCH variables, border radii, box shadows, fonts, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for FarmSiddhi, a B2B agricultural export corporate website, tracking version 49 with architectural notes, known issues (broken e-commerce, admin page, logo), and a list of existing implemented features.
